title: Leitstand map loader
goal: Implement a read-only Leitstand loader for a pinned Cabinet ecosystem map artifact manifest with explicit empty, corrupt, stale, and valid states.

acceptance.assertion: The loader reads configured local manifest/artifacts only and does not run git, fetch remote content, or mutate other repos.
Valid, missing, corrupt, and stale source states are represented in typed view data.
View data contains source identity and non-claims so the UI cannot present the map as runtime truth.

metadata.outcome: Historically implemented together with T003 through Leitstand PR #145. The original Cabinet loader satisfied the file-only, no-Git/no-fetch contract at merge; later merged hardening migrated source ownership to Systemkatalog and added bounded local read-only Git integrity checks without introducing remote fetch or mutation authority.

validation.implementation_ci: PR #145 passed CI build, security-hygiene, ai-context guards and Cloudflare Pages before merge.
validation.current_live: Current Leitstand main 550ee75ff365cdc0b82e82a10557817fb9d12130 is deployed; /ecosystem-map returns HTTP 200 and the dashboard links to it.
validation.contract_evolution: The exact PR #145 implementation used local readFile/path access only. Subsequent commits #162/#163/#165 added Systemkatalog source migration and bounded local Git integrity verification; this is later hardening, not evidence that the original file-only deliverable was absent.

verified_acceptance.read-only-loader: At PR #145 head a2d19414ca6ccccfa91eaa633a68e0c59aa5029e, src/controllers/ecosystemMap.ts read only the configured local manifest and artifacts via node:fs/promises and path helpers; the PR boundary explicitly recorded no Git/fetch, no Cabinet editing and no task dispatch. Later local Git integrity checks remain read-only but are outside the original acceptance snapshot.
verified_acceptance.state-model: The PR #145 loader typed source_kind as artifact/missing/corrupt and freshness_state as fresh/stale/unknown, with tests for valid, missing and stale states; current main additionally contains an explicit corrupt-manifest regression test.
verified_acceptance.public-boundary: PR #145 view data carried source repository, source commit and does_not_establish non-claims. Current main retains and strengthens this boundary with commit/hash binding and explicit runtime-correctness non-claims.
